collectiondata.overview:
Together We Wander: Community & Group Adventures with Travelxploria

Imagine an expedition where laughter echoes from emerald rice terraces to mist-clad mountain trails—an adventure designed for communities, clubs, corporate teams, or any group seeking shared discovery. As your Best Travel Agency, Best Tour Operator, and Best International Tour Operator, Travelxploria invites you to explore a world of possibilities.

Picture your group navigating the bustling floating markets of Thailand, then unwinding beneath the luminous Supertrees of Singapore—all arranged with seamless, skip-the-line perks. Perhaps you’ll trek through tea-fringed highlands in Malaysia, dive into Bali’s surf-kissed shores, or chase golden sunsets along Sri Lanka’s southern coast.

The desert dunes of Dubai await adrenaline-charged dune buggies, while the monasteries of Bhutan offer serene mountaintop retreats. Europe’s storybook villages beckon with castle-perched panoramas, and the mighty Himalayas call from Nepal, Kashmir, Uttarakhand, and Himachal Pradesh, where ancient trails reveal hidden waterfalls and valley-side villages. Round out your journey with backwater cruises in Kerala, drifting past swaying palms and spice-scented farms.

This is our Package—a curated tapestry of destinations, yet only the beginning of your collective odyssey. Whether you’re a trekking club, yoga community, alumni association, or corporate team, Travelxploria’s Best Tour Operator expertise adapts every stop to your group’s rhythm: private guides fluent in your interests, flexible accommodations from homestays to luxury lodges, and bespoke themes—from culinary workshops to conservation volunteering.

Looking for a touch of romance or family-friendly flair within your group? We seamlessly integrate our Romantic Package, Couple Package, Best Honeymoon Package, or Best Family Package options so every subgroup finds its perfect moment.

Because at Travelxploria, the world is your classroom, playground, and sanctuary. Your group’s story can stretch across continents—or delve deeper into a single region. These twelve destinations are invitations, not limits: your next chapter could unfold on African savannahs, South American peaks, or Arctic auroras.

Gather your community, share the wonder, and let Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, Best Tour Operator, and Best International Tour Operator—craft an unforgettable group tapestry. Book your Group Package today, and discover just how far together you can go.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Melbourne and enjoy breathtaking views from the Eureka Skydeck.
  • Witness the magic of wildlife on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade Eco Tour.
  • Discover the scenic wonders along the iconic Great Ocean Road.​
  • Depart Melbourne with a shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive on the Gold Coast and explore Movie World & Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Soar over the Gold Coast Hinterland on a serene hot air balloon ride with bonus Arro Jet experience.
  • Depart the Gold Coast via private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Sydney and explore top attractions with the Merlin Four Attraction Pass.
  • Venture into the Blue Mountains for a day of natural beauty, history, and wildlife.
  • Depart from Sydney, wrapping up your unforgettable Australian adventure.​

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free transfer from the airport directly to your 4-star hotel in Melbourne’s Central Business District, where a comfortable stay awaits you with breakfast included each morning.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Discover the awe-inspiring Twelve Apostles, stroll through charming coastal towns, and immerse yourself in the rich history of landmarks like the enchanting Loch Ard Gorge. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Embark on an unforgettable full-day journey with Brighton Coach’s Blue Mountains Day Tour, exploring the stunning natural wonders of this UNESCO World Heritage site. Discover the rich history, diverse wildlife, and awe-inspiring scenery of the Blue Mountains, including visits to Sydney Zoo, the thrilling rides at Scenic World, and panoramic views of the iconic Three Sisters. With comfortable transportation and an intimate small-group setting, this 8-hour adventure promises a memorable experience for travelers of all ages, with convenient pick-up from selected hotels or nearby locations.

Day 10 marks the conclusion of your unforgettable journey through Australia as you bid farewell to the vibrant urban oasis of Sydney. As you prepare to depart, take a moment to reflect on the cherished memories and incredible experiences gathered throughout your adventure Down Under. While you pack your belongings, be sure to carry with you the warmth of Australian hospitality, the awe-inspiring landscapes, and the countless moments of joy and discovery that have made this journey so special. Though your time in Australia comes to an end, the memories you’ve created will remain with you, enriching your life for years to come.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival in Marrakech, transfer to hotel, evening visit to Jemaa el-Fnaa square by caleche.
  •  Guided city tour of Marrakech including Medina, Bahia Palace, and free afternoon.
  • Travel across Atlas Mountains via Ait Benhaddou and Ouarzazate to Boumalne Dades.
  •  Explore the Valley of the Kasbahs, Todgha Gorge, Ksar el Khorbat, and relax in Erfoud.
  • Journey through Middle Atlas with stops in Midelt, Azrou, Bhalil, ending in Fez.
  •  Visit Fez Medina, Roman ruins at Volubilis, holy Moulay Idriss, then Meknes.
  •  Morning in Meknes, city tour of Rabat, arrive in Casablanca for dinner.
  •  Casablanca city tour including Hassan II Mosque, then return to Marrakech.
  • Departure day with luggage storage option and last-minute city exploration.​

[{"city":"Marrakesh","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063322140-AdobeStock_181226877.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063323050-AdobeStock_268816478.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063322486-AdobeStock_185679200.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063321547-AdobeStock_33151775.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063321780-AdobeStock_177811112.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063321954-AdobeStock_181219794.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063322313-AdobeStock_185292630.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063322658-AdobeStock_190390654.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063322831-AdobeStock_230278297.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Marrakesh/1747063323223-AdobeStock_549310892.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Morocco - Arrival","day_summary":"

Welcome to Morocco! Upon arrival in Marrakech, you will be transferred to your hotel where you can enjoy some free time to relax and settle in. At 6:00 p.m., join us for a charming Caleche ride through the city, taking you to the lively Jemaa el-Fnaa Square, which will be buzzing with vibrant energy and local culture at this hour. After soaking in the sights and sounds, we’ll return to the hotel for a delicious dinner and comfortable accommodation. Throughout your stay, a TravelXploria representative will be available to assist you and ensure a seamless experience.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Marrakesh Menara Airport","to":"Marrakesh","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1654,"h_name":"Adam Park","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Marrakesh","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Adam Park/1747474530958-Adam Park.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Adam Park/1747474531089-Adam Park1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Adam Park/1747474531179-Adam Park2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Marrakesh City Tour","day_summary":"

At 08:15 a.m., we will begin our guided city tour of Marrakech, a vibrant city nestled among palm groves and surrounded by iconic ochre-colored walls. We’ll explore the city's historic highlights, including the bustling Jemaa el-Fnaa Square, the lively Medina with its colorful souks, and the majestic Koutoubia Mosque. Our tour also includes a visit to the exquisite Bahia Palace (entry tickets included). After a fascinating morning, we’ll return to the hotel for lunch. The afternoon is free for leisure or exploration. In the evening, we suggest attending the Fantasy dinner show to enjoy an unforgettable display of Moroccan folklore.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"BOUMALNE DADES","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929881-AdobeStock_140643598.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929521-AdobeStock_66157969.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929726-AdobeStock_131049519.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062930036-AdobeStock_140643735.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Marrakech - Ait Benhaddou - Ourzazate - Boumalne Dades","day_summary":"

At 08:00 a.m., we depart Marrakech and begin a scenic journey through the majestic Atlas Mountains, a stunning natural divide between the city and the Sahara Desert. En route, we’ll stop in a charming mountain village for a brief break. By 01:30 p.m., we reach Ait Benhaddou, a UNESCO World Heritage site famed for its captivating adobe architecture featured in many films. After lunch and a relaxed stroll, we depart at 03:00 p.m. for Ouarzazate, arriving at 03:30 p.m. to explore its historic fortress. At 04:30 p.m., we continue through desert landscapes to Boumalne Dades. Arrival by 06:00 p.m. for dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Marrakesh","to":"BOUMALNE DADES","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1658,"h_name":"RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"BOUMALNE DADES","h_type":"Resort","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/BOUMALNE DADES/RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT/1747478216086-RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/BOUMALNE DADES/RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT/1747478216208-RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/BOUMALNE DADES/RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT/1747478216242-RESIDENCE KARAM RESORT2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"ERFOUD","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/ERFOUD/1747063029432-AdobeStock_547614544.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/ERFOUD/1747063029214-AdobeStock_139003160.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/ERFOUD/1747063029605-AdobeStock_1002859696.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Boumalne Dades - Todgha - Khorbat - Erfoud","day_summary":"

At 07:15 a.m., we depart Boumalne Dades and travel through the scenic Valley of the Kasbahs, known for its historic adobe fortresses nestled between the High and Saharan Atlas. Along the way, we’ll admire lush oases, palm groves, and charming villages. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Todgha Gorge to explore its towering canyon walls—one of Morocco’s most breathtaking natural wonders. After a short visit, we continue toward Ksar el Khorbat, an adobe village supported by the Europamundo Foundation. At 02:00 p.m., we reach Erfoud for lunch and relaxation. Optional dune excursion in Merzouga offers sunset views and dinner in the desert.




","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"BOUMALNE DADES","to":"ERFOUD","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1661,"h_name":"Erfoud Palace Hotel","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"ERFOUD","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/ERFOUD/Erfoud Palace Hotel/1747478859155-Erfoud Palace Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/ERFOUD/Erfoud Palace Hotel/1747478859271-Erfoud Palace Hotel1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/ERFOUD/Erfoud Palace Hotel/1747478859281-Erfoud Palace Hotel2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Fes","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Fes/1747063166321-AdobeStock_140217421.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Fes/1747063166624-AdobeStock_317330580.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Fes/1747063166795-AdobeStock_476974343.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/Fes/1747063166968-AdobeStock_552100961.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Erfoud - Midelt - Azrou - Bhalil - Fez","day_summary":"

We begin our journey from Erfoud at 08:00 a.m., crossing the scenic Atlas Mountains through dramatic gorges and a high plateau inhabited by nomadic shepherds. At 11:30 a.m., we stop in Midelt for a short walk in this town known for apple farming and stone crafts. After departing at 12:00 p.m., we enjoy lunch by a peaceful lake amid the stunning Middle Atlas landscape. By 03:15 p.m., we reach Azrou to visit the House of Cedars and see native monkeys. At 05:15 p.m., we explore Bhalil’s colorful, cave-integrated homes. Finally, at 06:45 p.m., we arrive in Fez and enjoy dinner.





","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"ERFOUD","to":"Fes","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1656,"h_name":"Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Fes","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Fes/Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez/1747474969898-Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Fes/Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez/1747474970038-Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Fes/Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez/1747474970097-Zalagh Parc Palace, Fez2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Meknes","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Fez Volubilis Moulay Idriss - Meknes","day_summary":"

In the morning, our Travelxploria representative will guide you through Fez, starting at the Royal Palace’s Bronze Gates. Explore the Jewish quarter, vibrant souks, and traditional tanneries. As Morocco’s cultural heart and home to the world’s oldest university, Fez boasts a fascinating Medina that captures authentic Arab heritage. Lunch will be served in a historic palace. At 3:00 p.m., we depart for Volubilis, a remarkable Roman archaeological site (entry included). At 5:45 p.m., we reach the sacred city of Moulay Idriss. After free time, we continue to Meknes, arriving at 7:30 p.m. for hotel check-in and a delightful dinner.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Fes","to":"Meknes","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1662,"h_name":"ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA ","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Meknes","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Meknes/ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA /1747481899798-ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Meknes/ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA /1747481899918-ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Meknes/ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA /1747481899957-ZAKI SUITES HOTEL & SPA 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Casablanca","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Meknes- Rabat - Casablanca","day_summary":"

At 8:30 a.m., after breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will lead a guided tour of Meknes, a UNESCO World Heritage Site founded in the 11th century by the Almoravids. Once the capital under Sultan Muley Ismail, it boasts grand Spanish-Moorish architecture and towering gates like Bab el Mansur. We’ll visit El Hedim Square and the Mausoleum of Moulay Ismail (entry included), with free time to explore. At 12:30 p.m., we depart, stopping for lunch en route. Arriving in Rabat at 3:30 p.m., we’ll tour highlights including the Oudaia Kasbah, Hassan Tower, and Royal Palace. At 6:30 p.m., we continue to Casablanca. Dinner included.

This morning, join our Travelxploria representative for a guided tour of Casablanca, Morocco’s largest city and economic hub. We’ll explore Mohamed V Square, surrounded by grand Moorish architecture and vibrant fountains, and stroll through the palm-lined Arab League Park. You’ll also visit the charming Medina and enjoy entry to the stunning seaside Hassan II Mosque, famed for its 210-meter-high minaret with a laser beam pointing toward Mecca. After the tour, enjoy free time for lunch in the scenic La Corniche area. At 3:30 p.m., we depart for Marrakech, arriving by 6:45 p.m. Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel included.








","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Casablanca","to":"Marrakesh","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1654,"h_name":"Adam Park","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Marrakesh","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Adam Park/1747474530958-Adam Park.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Adam Park/1747474531089-Adam Park1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Adam Park/1747474531179-Adam Park2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Morocco - Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, your unforgettable Moroccan adventure with TravelXploria comes to a close. Our representative will ensure a smooth check-out and assist with any final arrangements. As you depart, carry with you the cherished memories of vibrant cities, breathtaking landscapes, and cultural wonders. We hope to welcome you again for another remarkable journey with TravelXploria.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Paris and begin your European adventure.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and enjoy Eiffel Tower access.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to Brussels and relax in the Belgian capital.

  • Explore Brussels' iconic sights and local culture.

  • Head to Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant city.

  • Experience Amsterdam’s highlights with a city and canal cruise.

  • Enjoy the Heineken Experience and explore Van Gogh’s masterpieces.

  • Travel to Cologne and enjoy a scenic Rhine River cruise.

  • Continue to Frankfurt and explore at your leisure.

  • Journey to Munich, the Bavarian cultural hub.

  • Discover Munich’s history, architecture, and vibrant streets.

  • Bid farewell to Germany and fly home with lasting memories.

city tour with Eiffel Tower Ticket","day_summary":"

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Explore the two enchanting parks—Disneyland Park and Walt Disney Studios—packed with thrilling rides, spectacular shows, and beloved Disney characters. Marvel at the iconic Sleeping Beauty Castle, take on adrenaline-pumping attractions like Space Mountain, and be mesmerized by dazzling parades and fireworks. Perfect for families, couples, and Disney fans of all ages, this adventure guarantees laughter, excitement, and cherished memories. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless arrangements, your Disney dream day in Europe’s most magical destination awaits.

packages.overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

packages.package_name: European Capitals & Cultural Marvels: From Spain to England
packages.overview:
• Spain – A Tapestry of Culture & Heritage
  • Madrid – Explore the Royal Palace, Prado Museum, and Plaza Mayor, experiencing Spain's capital at its finest.
  • Barcelona – Admire Gaudí’s masterpieces like Sagrada Familia and Park Güell, and stroll along La Rambla.
  • Seville – Visit the Alcázar Palace, Seville Cathedral, and experience authentic Flamenco.
  • Valencia – Discover the City of Arts and Sciences and relax on stunning Mediterranean beaches.
  • France – A Stop in Timeless Beauty
  • Paris – Wander through the Champs-Élysées, Eiffel Tower, and Louvre Museum, soaking in French romance.
  • Normandy & Rouen – Walk through history at Mont Saint-Michel, the D-Day beaches, and Rouen Cathedral.
  • England – A Blend of Royalty & Tradition
  • London – Visit the Tower of London, Buckingham Palace, Big Ben, and the British Museum.
    🇬🇧 Durham & Edinburgh – Experience the medieval charm of Durham Cathedral and Scotland’s capital, with its Edinburgh Castle and Royal Mile.
  • Liverpool & Manchester – Discover the home of The Beatles and explore England’s rich industrial heritage.

Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

Around 4:00 p.m., we’ll depart Paris and head to Normandy, arriving in Rouen. You´ll have free time to explore the historic center of this vibrant city, which dates back to Roman times and boasts charming medieval architecture and an impressive Gothic cathedral, offering a delightful blend of history and culture.

Our journey will continue to London, where you’ll have some free time in the Tower Bridge area, one of the city´s most iconic symbols, before we head to the hotel.

Discover London on a panoramic tour with a local guide that showcases the city’s culture and history. You’ll see famous sites such as the Parliament, the River Thames, and Buckingham Palace, where you might witness the iconic Changing of the Guard (depending on the dates). In the evening, we’ll establish a meeting point in Piccadilly to take a stroll through Leicester Square, Chinatown, and Soho, areas renowned for their lively atmosphere, theaters, and entertainment options. You’ll have plenty of restaurants to choose from for dinner before we return to the hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day from London","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll go to the British Museum, one of the world´s oldest and most renowned museums, featuring artifacts from cultures around the globe. At lunchtime, we’ll provide a transfer to Camden, famous for its vibrant and eclectic market, where you can browse items from various cultures. The afternoon is free for you to explore at your leisure.

Our journey will come to an end, leaving you with wonderful and lasting memories.

packages.package_name: Grand European Odyssey: Castles, Coasts & Culture
packages.overview:
Spain: The Land of Passion & Heritage

1. Madrid – The Spanish Capital of Art & Culture

  • Explore the world-famous Prado Museum, home to masterpieces by Goya and Velázquez.

  • Visit the majestic Royal Palace of Madrid, the largest royal palace in Europe.

  • Stroll through Plaza Mayor and enjoy traditional Spanish tapas.

  • Admire the lively atmosphere at Puerta del Sol, Madrid’s bustling square.

2. Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpiece

  • Marvel at the Sagrada Familia, Antoni Gaudí’s architectural wonder.

  • Wander through Park Güell, a colorful, surreal park full of artistic mosaics.

  • Walk along the famous La Rambla, lined with street performers and markets.

  • Visit the Gothic Quarter, filled with medieval history and charming cafes.

3. Seville – The Heart of Andalusia

  • Watch an authentic Flamenco performance in the historic Triana district.

  • Visit the stunning Alcázar of Seville, a blend of Moorish and Spanish architecture.

  • Walk through Plaza de España, an iconic landmark with stunning bridges and canals.

  • Explore the Seville Cathedral and climb the Giralda Tower for panoramic views.

Austria: The Land of Imperial Majesty & Music

4. Vienna – The City of Music & Royalty

  • Visit the opulent Schönbrunn Palace, the summer residence of the Habsburgs.

  • Experience classical music at the Vienna State Opera.

  • Explore the Hofburg Palace, once the center of the Austrian Empire.

  • Stroll through St. Stephen’s Cathedral and the historic city center.

5. Salzburg – Mozart’s Birthplace & Alpine Beauty

  • Discover the stunning Hohensalzburg Fortress, overlooking the city.

  • Visit Mirabell Palace & Gardens, featured in The Sound of Music.

  • Explore Mozart’s Birthplace, a must-visit for music lovers.

  • Enjoy breathtaking views of the Austrian Alps.

We’ll head to France, traveling through the Provence region. Our first stop will be Arles, a small UNESCO World Heritage city known for its connections to Van Gogh. Here, we can visit the Roman theater and quaint Romanesque churches. There will be time to explore and have lunch. Next, we’ll include a visit to Carrières des Lumières, an incredible underground art experience featuring a captivating display of art, images, and sound in an ancient quarry. We’ll arrive in Chambery, the charming capital of Savoy, for the evening, a medieval style city with beautiful historic center and large castle.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Girona","to":"Chambéry","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":818,"h_name":"Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry","h_country":"France","h_city":"Chambéry","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995652-2024-10-18.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995756-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154914.538.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995762-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154907.457.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Leysin","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/package/Leysin/1744874728567-Leysin.jpg"},{"path":"/package/Leysin/1744874728642-Leysin 1.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Chambéry to Leysin","day_summary":"

We’ll journey to Switzerland, arriving in Geneva. With our guide, we’ll go to Palais des Nations (headquarters of the United Nations in Europe), and we’ll see the beautiful English Garden with its flower clock, and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe. Our next stop will be the charming, walled village of Gruyères, world-renowned for its cheese. Nearby, there are some of Switzerland´s major chocolate factories, including Nestlé. Our tour includes admission to the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory, where you’ll enjoy a sweet tasting experience.

We’ll continue our journey along scenic roads, passing through bucolic mountain landscapes and picturesque wooden villages, until we reach Chillon Castle, built on the shores of Lake Geneva (admission included). We’ll arrive in Leysin by mid-afternoon, a charming holiday village with spectacular views of the Rhône Valley and Mont Blanc. Leysin is well-known for its winter sports resort and hiking options. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Chambéry","to":"Leysin","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":819,"h_name":"Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Leysin","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263067-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155357.715.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263177-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155350.941.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263183-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155341.110.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Leysin to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll experience stunning mountain scenery today, so be sure to pack your winter clothes. We’ll ascend to Glacier 3000 by cable car ride, one of the most spectacular spots in Switzerland featuring ice and snow year-round, and where you can walk on the suspended bridge between two mountain peaks, explore the Ice Cathedral, or enjoy the Fun Park. We’ll stop in Interlaken for lunch before traveling to Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. In the evening, we’ll arrive in Zurich, with some time to explore the center before heading to the hotel.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Leysin","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Milan","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230155-istockphoto-1440344960-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230259-istockphoto-1803908283-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230361-istockphoto-496267664-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Milan","day_summary":"

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Milan","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":656,"h_name":"BELSTAY MILANO LINATE","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Milan","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Milan/BELSTAY MILANO LINATE/1741087935274-2024-07-03.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Milan/BELSTAY MILANO LINATE/1741087935397-000_Belstay Hotels_rooms.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Milan/BELSTAY MILANO LINATE/1741087935431-unnamed (9).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Milan to Pisa to Rome","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Milan","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.


In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris, led by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide. Explore iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd Level of the Eiffel Tower, offering a stunning panoramic view of Paris. After a delightful lunch, visit the magnificent Palace of Versailles, a masterpiece of 17th-century French artistry. Later, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, passing Notre Dame, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, followed by the enchanting Paris by Night tour. End your perfect day with a sumptuous dinner. Overnight stay in Paris with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Amsterdam","country":"Netherlands","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630270-istockphoto-1768484817-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630372-istockphoto-937057490-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630429-istockphoto-615718444-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":" Brussels: A Journey Through Europe in Miniature ","day_summary":"

Today, embark on an exciting journey to Brussels, the vibrant capital of Belgium and the headquarters of the European Union. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will guide you to the iconic Grand Place, one of Europe's most stunning squares, where you’ll admire the medieval Town Hall and the famous Manneken Pis statue. Next, experience the charm of Mini-Europe, a fascinating miniature park showcasing over 350 meticulously crafted European landmarks. packages.package_name: Fairy Tale Journey Through France, Britain & the Netherlands
packages.overview:
Travelxploria's Ultimate European Journey: Explore Iconic Landmarks Across the Continent

Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria as we guide you through the heart of Europe’s most iconic cities, where history, culture, and breathtaking beauty await at every turn. Begin your journey in Paris, where the stunning Eiffel Tower offers panoramic views of the city, and the world-renowned Louvre Museum houses masterpieces like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo. As you wander the historic streets, marvel at the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and stroll along the Champs-Élysées, reaching the imposing Arc de Triomphe.

Next, discover the captivating city of London, where landmarks like Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament dominate the skyline. Explore the ancient halls of the Tower of London, and don’t miss the spectacular view from the London Eye, offering a new perspective on this vibrant city. Venture north to Edinburgh, where Edinburgh Castle sits proudly atop the city’s skyline, and hike up Arthur’s Seat for breathtaking panoramic views of Scotland’s capital.

In Glasgow, enjoy the peaceful tranquility of the Botanic Gardens and discover the fascinating exhibits at the Kelvingrove Art Gallery & Museum. Then, travel to Dublin, where you can explore the historic Trinity College and gaze upon the Book of Kells, an illuminated manuscript that has survived for centuries. While in Ireland, make sure to enjoy a pint at the Guinness Storehouse, where the legacy of Ireland’s famous beer comes to life.

As your journey continues, visit the charming Amsterdam, where a scenic Canal Cruise offers a picturesque way to view the city’s most iconic landmarks, including the Rijksmuseum and the Van Gogh Museum.

Lastly, for music lovers, head to Liverpool, where you can pay tribute to The Beatles at the Beatles Story and explore the city’s historic Royal Albert Dock. With Travelxploria, each destination is carefully curated to give you an immersive and unforgettable European experience.

After, we´ll visit Urquhart Castle (admission included) from where we´ll embark on a boat ride on the dark waters of Loch Ness. Next, we’ll pass by Fort Augustus with its sluice system and Fort William, a tourist center at the foot of Ben Nevis, the highest summit in the United Kingdom. Heading south, we’ll travel through the high plateaus, where snow is often visible, and skirt the picturesque shores of Loch Lomond. We’ll arrive in Glasgow at the end of the day.

Though our adventure together comes to an end, the friendships, stories, and cherished experiences will stay with you forever.

packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris with your expert Travelxploria representative. Witness the grandeur of Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, the iconic Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd level of the Eiffel Tower for breathtaking panoramic views of the City of Lights. After a delicious lunch, explore the majestic Palace of Versailles, renowned for its opulent halls and enchanting gardens. Return to Paris for a sumptuous dinner before unwinding at your hotel.Overnight stay in Paris.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Magical Day at Disneyland & Enchanting Paris","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before venturing into the wonders of Disneyland Paris. Choose between two captivating parks—Disney Park, where fairy tales come to life with thrilling rides, vibrant parades, and beloved Disney characters, or Walt Disney Studios Park, offering breathtaking stunt shows and behind-the-scenes movie magic. After a delicious lunch, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, gliding past Paris’ most iconic landmarks. As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

As the day winds down, savor a delicious dinner before traveling comfortably to the Netherlands.Overnight stay in the Netherlands.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mt. Titlis Adventure & Lucerne Charm","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and enriching experiences, accompanied by our expert tour guide and representative. Begin your journey in Vaduz, the charming capital of Liechtenstein, one of the world’s smallest yet most picturesque countries nestled in the Alps. Enjoy a guided mini train ride, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the stunning landscape. Next, visit the world-renowned Swarovski Crystal World in Wattens, where dazzling crystalline masterpieces captivate visitors. Continue to Innsbruck, the enchanting capital of Tyrol, and stroll through Maria Theresien Strasse, lined with historic buildings and lively cafés. Marvel at the iconic Golden Roof, a symbol of Innsbruck’s medieval charm, set against a spectacular Alpine backdrop. After a day filled with beauty and culture, indulge in a sumptuous lunch and dinner before retiring for an overnight stay in Innsbruck.

After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy, a city of timeless charm and romance. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, experience a seamless and luxurious adventure. Upon arrival at the pier, our Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will escort you on a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Explore the magnificent St. Mark’s Basilica, admire the Bell Tower and Clock Tower, and marvel at the iconic Bridge of Sighs, a symbol of Venetian history. To truly immerse yourself in the magic of Venice, enjoy a romantic gondola ride, gliding through its picturesque canals. After a day of exploration, indulge in a delicious lunch, check in at your hotel, and unwind over a delightful dinner. Overnight stay in Padova/Bologna/Ferrara

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a guided tour of Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with an expert guide from Travelxploria, the best travel agency. Marvel at the city's most iconic landmark, the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, famous for its Gates of Paradise. Explore Piazza della Signoria, an open air museum adorned with Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, the historic bridge spanning the River Arno. Next, journey to Pisa to witness the architectural wonder of the Leaning Tower of Pisa, set within the breathtaking Square of Miracles. After an enriching day, enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner before retiring for the night. Overnight stay in the Tuscany region.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and journey to Rome, the Eternal City, with an experienced Travelxploria guide ensuring a seamless experience. As the best travel agency, we present an immersive tour of Vatican City, the world’s smallest country. Explore the magnificent St. Peter’s Basilica, the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel, and Michelangelo’s masterpiece, The Last Judgement. Next, enjoy a delicious lunch before visiting the iconic Colosseum, followed by the legendary Trevi Fountain, where tossing a coin is said to ensure your return. Discover the Victor Emmanuel Monument and the Roman Forum. If Vatican Museum entry is unavailable due to the Jubilee year, our dedicated representative will arrange Colosseum entry instead. End the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay in Rome.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

packages.package_name: European Odyssey Exploring Iconic Landmarks and Hidden Gems
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let our expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

After check-out, sit back and relax in our comfortable coach as we journey towards the charming city of Lisse. Accompanied by our Travelxploria representative, get ready to visit the world-famous Keukenhof Gardens (open until May 11th), where you'll be captivated by an endless sea of tulips, daffodils, and hyacinths, creating a mesmerizing palette of colors. From May 12th onwards, we take you to a picturesque Dutch village near Amsterdam, known for its iconic windmills, traditional wooden houses, and artisan workshops, offering an authentic glimpse into 18th-century Dutch culture. Next, we head to Amsterdam, where you will embark on a scenic glass-topped boat cruise, gliding through the city's picturesque canals, admiring its historic bridges and charming old houses. Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary

Today, get ready for breathtaking scenery and a once-in-a-lifetime experience with an exhilarating journey to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters, exclusively organized by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Ascend the majestic peak using various cable cars, including the Rotair, the world’s first revolving cable car, offering unrestricted 360-degree views of the dazzling snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine white snowfields, dotted with massive ice boulders. At the summit, dare to walk across the famous Cliff Walk, the highest suspension bridge in Europe, for an adrenaline-pumping experience with spectacular panoramic views. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. Visit the historic Lion Monument and stroll across the iconic Kapellbrücke (Chapel Bridge). Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria has curated the perfect Swiss adventure for you
