ENJOY GONDOLA RIDE","day_summary":"

 After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara

This morning, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with Travelxploria – the best travel agency ensuring a seamless experience. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Marvel at Florence’s most iconic landmark – the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, home to the famed Gates of Paradise. Stroll through the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air museum filled with stunning Renaissance sculptures, surrounded by historic cafés, and dominated by the majestic Palazzo Vecchio. Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region

packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, rich culture, and stunning landscapes along the Nile and the Red Sea.

  2. Cairo: The capital city, home to the iconic Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and vibrant markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Nile Cruise: A luxurious journey between Luxor and Aswan, exploring ancient temples like Karnak, Philae, and Edfu, with breathtaking river views.

  4. Hurghada: A Red Sea paradise, offering pristine beaches, scuba diving, snorkeling, and desert safaris.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel, then embark on an unforgettable journey through Egypt’s iconic landmarks. Begin at the Great Pyramid of Cheops, the largest and only surviving wonder of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. Explore the Pyramid of Chephren, the best-preserved, and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Stand in awe before the Great Sphinx, a magnificent structure carved from natural rock, with a lion’s body stretching 45 meters long. Continue to the Papyrus Institute, where you’ll discover the ancient art of papermaking, followed by a visit to the Papyrus Museum, Perfume Factory, and Jewelry Shop for a taste of authentic Egyptian craftsmanship. Enjoy a leisurely evening before an overnight stay in Cairo.

Start your day with an early breakfast, then transfer to Cairo Airport for your flight to Aswan. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will greet you with seamless assistance and escort you to your luxurious Nile cruise. After boarding, meet your expert guide and set off to explore Aswan’s most remarkable sights—the High Dam, a marvel of modern engineering, and the Unfinished Obelisk, an incredible testament to ancient Egyptian craftsmanship. Return to the cruise for check-in and enjoy a delicious lunch onboard. The evening is yours to relax or opt for an exciting optional excursion, arranged by your guide. Unwind with a delightful dinner onboard, followed by an overnight stay on the cruise, floating on the majestic Nile River.

Enjoy a leisurely breakfast onboard as your Nile cruise sails towards Kom Ombo, home to the unique double temple dedicated to the crocodile god Sobek and falcon-headed god Horus. Explore its fascinating reliefs and ancient mummified crocodiles before returning to the cruise. Lunch is served onboard as you continue sailing towards Edfu. In the evening, enjoy a delicious dinner onboard, followed by a peaceful overnight stay on the cruise, surrounded by the magical scenery of the Nile River. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sailing to Luxor & Discovering Karnak Temple","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast onboard as the Nile cruise sails to Luxor. Enjoy the stunning views along the river before savoring a freshly prepared lunch on deck. In the afternoon, embark on an unforgettable visit to Karnak Temple, the largest religious complex in Egypt, dedicated to the god Amun-Ra. Walk through the Great Hypostyle Hall, marvel at the towering obelisks, and soak in the mystical aura of this ancient site. The evening is free for leisure, where you can choose from optional excursions or simply relax onboard. Dinner is served, followed by an overnight stay on the cruise. 

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Hurghada","country":"Egypt","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Hurghada/1744965093518-AdobeStock_210079817.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Luxor’s West Bank & Journey to Hurghada","day_summary":"

Begin your day with breakfast onboard, followed by an enriching West Bank tour in Luxor. Walk through the legendary Valley of the Kings, where ancient pharaohs, including Tutankhamun, were laid to rest in elaborately decorated tombs. Visit the Mortuary Temple of Hatshepsut, an architectural marvel dedicated to one of Egypt’s most powerful queens. Stop by the Colossi of Memnon, two towering statues guarding the remains of an ancient temple.

After the tour, embark on a private transfer to Hurghada, a scenic journey from the desert landscapes of Luxor to the stunning Red Sea coast. Upon arrival, check-in at your hotel and unwind. Enjoy a delicious dinner, then relax with an overnight stay in Hurghada.

Enjoy a free day in Hurghada, where you can relax by the crystal-clear waters of the Red Sea or take part in exciting optional activities. Choose from an unforgettable boat trip with snorkeling and diving, explore the marine life from a submarine adventure, experience an exhilarating desert safari (5x1) on quad bikes and camels, or take a city tour to discover the vibrant culture of Hurghada.

After a day of relaxation or adventure, return to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a comfortable overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Exploration in Hurghada","day_summary":"

Enjoy a free day at your own pace in the beautiful coastal city of Hurghada. Whether you choose to relax by the beach or embark on an exciting adventure, the day is yours to enjoy. Opt for a boat trip with snorkeling and diving, take a mesmerizing submarine ride, go on an exhilarating 5x1 desert safari, or explore the city on a guided tour.

Savor delicious meals throughout the day and unwind at your hotel in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Relaxation in Hurghada","day_summary":"

Spend a leisurely day in Hurghada, soaking in the sun or indulging in thrilling experiences. Choose from a variety of optional activities, including a boat trip with snorkeling and diving, a fascinating submarine excursion, an adrenaline-pumping 5x1 desert safari, or a captivating city tour. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, this day is tailored to your preferences.

Enjoy delicious meals and unwind at your hotel in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell & Departure from Hurghada","day_summary":"

Take with you cherished memories of Egypt and the wonderful experiences shared with newfound friends.

packages.overview:
1: Arrival in Cairo – Meet & assist at the airport, transfer to hotel & overnight.

2: Explore the Pyramids, Sphinx, Papyrus Institute & shopping tour – Overnight in Cairo.

3: Fly to Aswan, embark on Nile Cruise, visit High Dam & Unfinished Obelisk – Overnight onboard.

4: Sail to Kom Ombo & Edfu, visit temples – Overnight onboard.

5: Sail to Luxor, explore Karnak Temple – Overnight onboard.

6: Explore Luxor West Bank (Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon), fly back to Cairo – Overnight in Cairo.

7: Check out & transfer to Cairo International Airport for departure.

After breakfast at the hotel, embark on an unforgettable journey through ancient Egypt with Travelxploria's Representative. Visit the iconic Pyramids Plateau, starting with the Great Pyramid of Cheops, the largest of the three and the only surviving wonder of the Seven Great Wonders of the Ancient World. Continue to the Pyramid of Chephren, known for its remarkable preservation, and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Admire the majestic Sphinx, a stunning structure carved from natural rock, featuring a lion’s body stretching 45 meters with 15-meter-long paws. Explore the Papyrus Institute to learn about ancient paper-making techniques, followed by shopping at the Papyrus Museum, Perfume Factory, and Jewelry Shop. The evening is free at leisure, followed by an overnight stay at your hotel. Meals: Breakfast.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Nile Cruise","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":" Arrive Aswan Airport - Nile cruise - Aswan Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, check out and transfer to Cairo Airport for your domestic flight to Aswan. Upon arrival, Travelxploria's Representative will meet and assist you before transferring you to your luxurious Nile cruise. After embarkation and settling in, meet your guide for a fascinating tour of Aswan’s iconic landmarks, including the impressive High Dam and the Unfinished Obelisk, a testament to ancient Egyptian craftsmanship. Return to the cruise for check-in and enjoy a delightful lunch onboard. The evening is at leisure, offering the opportunity to join optional excursions suggested by your guide or simply relax and soak in the serene ambiance of the Nile. Enjoy dinner and overnight stay onboard the cruise. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner.

Enjoy breakfast onboard as your Nile cruise sets sail toward Kom Ombo. Upon arrival, Travelxploria's Representative will guide you through the fascinating Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to the crocodile god Sobek and the falcon-headed god Haroeris. After exploring this unique twin temple, return to the cruise and savor a delicious lunch as you continue sailing toward Edfu. Relax onboard and admire the breathtaking Nile scenery before enjoying a delightful dinner and an overnight stay onboard the cruise. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Nile Cruise - Karnak temple","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast onboard as your Nile cruise sails toward Luxor. Upon arrival, enjoy a delicious lunch before Travelxploria's Representative accompanies you on an exploration of Luxor’s iconic landmarks, including the majestic Karnak Temple, the largest ancient religious complex in Egypt. The evening is free at leisure, allowing you to indulge in optional excursions or simply relax onboard. Conclude your day with a delectable dinner and an overnight stay on the cruise, preparing for your journey back to Cairo the next day. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner.

Following the tour, transfer to Luxor Airport for your flight to Cairo. Upon arrival, our representative will escort you to your hotel for check-in and an overnight stay in Cairo. Meals: Breakfast.

packages.package_name: Beautiful Egypt Package - Cairo, Alexandria and Siwa
packages.overview:
1: Arrival in Cairo, meet & greet by Travelxploria representative, transfer to hotel, check-in, and briefing.

2: Explore the Pyramids, Sphinx, and Egyptian Museum with guided tour.

3: Travel to Alexandria, visit Qaitbay Citadel, Pompey’s Pillar, and Catacombs, then check-in at hotel.

4: Transfer to Siwa Oasis, visit Mountain of the Dead, Alexander the Great Temple, Siwa House Museum, and Shali Fortress.

5: Visit Cleopatra Bath, swim in Salt Lakes, experience sandboarding, and enjoy a sunset with Bedouin tea and camp dinner.

6: Check out, drive back to Cairo (9 hours), check-in at hotel, and overnight stay.

7: Check out and transfer to Cairo International Airport for final departure.

After breakfast, the Representative of Travelxploria will take you on an unforgettable journey through ancient Egypt, starting with the iconic Pyramids of Giza. Witness the grandeur of the Great Pyramid of Cheops, the largest and the only surviving wonder of the Seven Great Wonders of the Ancient World, followed by the well-preserved Pyramid of Chephren and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Nearby, marvel at the magnificent Sphinx, a breathtaking structure carved from natural rock, featuring a lion's body stretching 45 meters with 15-meter-long paws. Later, proceed to the renowned Egyptian Museum, where you will spend two hours exploring its vast collection, including the legendary treasures of King Tutankhamun, highlighted by his stunning golden mask. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch.

Upon arrival, explore the city's rich history with visits to the impressive Qaitbay Citadel, an ancient fortress overlooking the Mediterranean, the towering Pompay Pillar, and the fascinating Catacombs, an underground necropolis showcasing a blend of Egyptian, Greek, and Roman influences. After an enriching day of sightseeing, transfer to your hotel for check-in and overnight stay. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch.

After a refreshing breakfast at the hotel, the Representative of Travelxploria will accompany you on an exciting day of exploration in Siwa. Begin with a visit to Cleopatra’s Bath, a natural spring believed to have been used by the legendary queen. Next, enjoy a rejuvenating swim in the stunning Salt Lakes, known for their therapeutic properties. Continue the adventure with an exhilarating sandboarding experience on the golden dunes, followed by a mesmerizing sunset view from the highest point in Siwa while sipping traditional Bedouin tea. Conclude the day with a delightful dinner at a desert camp before returning to the hotel for an overnight stay. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner.

packages.package_name: Nile Majesty A Luxurious Cruise Through Egypt
packages.overview:
​1: Arrival at Cairo International Airport | Check-in Cruise
​2: Explore the Majestic Pyramids & Egyptian Museum
​3: Discover the Pyramids, Sphinx, Sakkara, Memphis & Dahshour
​4: Journey from Cairo to Beni Suef | Begin Sailing Adventure
​5: Scenic Sailing towards Minya | Enjoy Onboard Activities
​6: Visit the Fascinating Beni Hassan Tombs
​7: Explore Tel El Amarna & View Tawdrous Monastery
​8: Sail to Sohag | Relax and Enjoy the Nile Views
​9: Discover the Ancient Abydos Temple
​10: Visit the Stunning Dendarah Temple
​11: Explore the Historic West Bank of Luxor
​12: Visit the East Bank & Sail through Esna Lock
​13: Explore Edfu & Kom Ombo Temples
​14: Sightseeing in Aswan | High Dam & Philae Temple
​15: Farewell & Transfer to Cairo International Airport​
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Nile Cruise","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Cairo International Airport | Check in Cruise","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Cairo International Airport, our Travelxploria representative will greet you warmly and assist with customs and formalities, ensuring a seamless arrival experience. You will then be transferred in a modern, air-conditioned vehicle to your luxury Nile cruise, where you will embark on an unforgettable journey (official check-in time around 15:00 hrs). After settling in, enjoy a delightful lunch on board, followed by a relaxing afternoon taking in the scenic beauty of the Nile. As the evening sets in, indulge in a delicious dinner, featuring a variety of options, before unwinding in your comfortable accommodation. Enjoy an overnight stay in Cairo, as you prepare for the incredible adventures ahead with Travelxploria’s expert guidance and impeccable service.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Cairo International Airport","to":"Nile Cruise","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1222,"h_name":"Acamar Nile Cruise","h_country":"Egypt","h_city":"Nile Cruise","h_type":"Cruise","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Acamar Nile Cruise/1743148759014-Acamar Nile Cruise 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Acamar Nile Cruise/1743148759084-Acamar Nile Cruise 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Acamar Nile Cruise/1743148759090-Acamar Nile Cruise.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Acamar Nile Cruise/1743148759121-Acamar Nile Cruise 1.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1221,"h_name":"Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship","h_country":"Egypt","h_city":"Nile Cruise","h_type":"Cruise","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship/1743148503716-Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship/1743148503786-Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Nile Cruise/Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship/1743148503826-Sonesta Moon Goddess Nile Cruise Ship.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" Pyramids | Egyptian Musuem","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board, preparing for an exciting adventure with Travelxploria’s expert guide. At 07:00 AM, embark on a journey to explore the iconic Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx, marveling at these ancient wonders that have stood the test of time. After an immersive morning, return to the cruise and enjoy a delightful international buffet lunch while sailing along the Nile. In the afternoon, visit the world-renowned Egyptian Museum, home to an extensive collection of artifacts, including the treasures of King Tutankhamun. As the day winds down, indulge in an exquisite Lebanese buffet dinner on board, followed by a relaxing overnight stay in Cairo, with Travelxploria ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Pyramids, Sphinx, Sakkara & Memphis - Dahshour","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board, preparing for another exciting journey with Travelxploria’s expert guide. At 07:30 AM, embark on a visit to Memphis & Sakkara, where you will explore the Step Pyramid of Djoser, the first of its kind, and the ancient capital of Egypt. After a fascinating morning, return to the cruise and enjoy a Mediterranean buffet lunch while soaking in the serene views. In the afternoon, delve into the spiritual heart of Cairo with a visit to Coptic Cairo, exploring the Hanging Church, the Coptic Museum, and the Jewish Synagogue, each offering a glimpse into Egypt’s diverse religious history. As evening falls, savor a set-menu dinner on board, followed by a captivating Oriental Tkht show, bringing you closer to Egypt’s rich cultural heritage. Travelxploria ensures a seamless and unforgettable experience, ending the day with a peaceful overnight stay in Cairo.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Cairo | Beni Suef","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast on board, setting the tone for a relaxing full-day sail to Beni Suef with Travelxploria’s seamless arrangements. As you glide along the majestic Nile River, take in the breathtaking scenery and unwind in the luxurious comforts of your cruise. At 1:00 PM, indulge in a flavorful Mexican buffet lunch, savoring a variety of delicious dishes. As the evening sets in, enjoy a delightful BBQ dinner on board, accompanied by a live singer performance, adding a touch of magic to your Nile journey. End your tranquil day with a comfortable overnight stay in Beni Suef, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience with Travelxploria’s expert care.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Sailing to Minya","day_summary":"

Set sail for Minya at dawn, embracing a serene morning on the majestic Nile with Travelxploria’s seamless arrangements. Enjoy a delightful breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, soaking in the peaceful river views as you cruise towards your next destination. Midday, savor an exquisite French buffet lunch at 12:30 PM, offering a taste of fine culinary delights. As evening approaches, relish a carefully curated set-menu dinner at 7:30 PM, followed by an enchanting Folklore Party at 8:00 PM, where you can experience Egypt’s vibrant cultural heritage. Conclude the day with a comfortable overnight stay in Minya, ensuring a hassle-free and unforgettable journey with Travelxploria’s expert care.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Bani Hassan Tombs","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast on board at 5:00 AM, setting the tone for an exciting adventure arranged seamlessly by Travelxploria’s expert team. At 6:00 AM, embark on a fascinating journey to explore Tuna El Gebel and Ashmunein, sites rich with ancient Egyptian history. Return to the cruise for a light buffet lunch at 12:30 PM, before setting off at 1:30 PM for an awe-inspiring visit to the Beni Hassan tombs. Discover the Tomb of Baqet III (BH15), Tomb of Khety (BH17), Tomb of Amenemhet (BH2), and Tomb of Khnumhotep II (BH3) during an enriching two-hour guided tour. By 4:00 PM, return to the cruise for relaxation, followed by a delicious Italian buffet dinner at 7:30 PM. End your day with a peaceful overnight stay in Minya, enjoying the seamless comfort and care of Travelxploria’s exceptional service.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Tel El Amarna | Tawdrous Monastery","day_summary":"

At 5:00 AM, set sail toward Tel El Amarna, home to the fascinating Amarnian experience, with Travelxploria’s expert representative ensuring a smooth and insightful journey. Enjoy a hearty breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, preparing you for an immersive 10:00 AM visit to the northern tombs of Tel El Amarna, including the Royal Tomb of Akhenaten, the Northern Palace, and the Small Temples of Aten. By 1:00 PM, relish a delicious English buffet lunch on board while sailing towards Assyut. At 1:30 PM, pause to admire the magnificent Prince Tawdrous Monastery, with your knowledgeable guide sharing insights into its historical and religious significance. As the evening sets in, delight in a BBQ dinner on board at 7:30 PM, followed by a lively Galabia Party, offering a fun cultural experience. Conclude your day with an overnight stay in Assyut, ensuring a seamless and enriching travel experience with Travelxploria.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sail to Sohag","day_summary":"

At 5:00 AM, embark on a smooth sailing journey towards Sohag, with Travelxploria’s expert representative ensuring a seamless and comfortable experience. Start your day with a delightful breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, soaking in the serene views along the Nile. As the cruise glides through the tranquil waters, enjoy a sumptuous international buffet lunch at 1:00 PM, offering a variety of flavors to savor. By 7:30 PM, indulge in a rich Oriental buffet dinner, perfectly capturing the essence of Egyptian cuisine. Spend a peaceful night on board with an overnight stay in Sohag, as Travelxploria takes care of every detail to enhance your journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Abydos temple","day_summary":"

At 3:30 AM, set sail towards El Balyana, with Travelxploria’s dedicated representative ensuring a seamless experience. Enjoy a delicious breakfast on board at 7:00 AM before heading to Abydos Temple, the sacred city of Osiris, God of the Dead, and explore the magnificent New Kingdom temple of Seti I at 9:30 AM. Return to the cruise by 11:30 AM and continue sailing toward Naga Hammadi, passing through its locks and bridges. Relish a flavorful Moroccan buffet lunch at 1:00 PM while enjoying the picturesque surroundings. In the evening, indulge in a BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM, before arriving at Naga Hammadi for an overnight stay. As dawn breaks, embark on a 5:00 AM sail to Qena, followed by a hearty breakfast at 7:30 AM, with Travelxploria ensuring a luxurious and unforgettable journey throughout.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Dendarah Temple","day_summary":"

At 10:00 AM, embark on a short 20-minute drive to the magnificent Dendarah Temple, one of Egypt’s best-preserved temple complexes, dedicated to Hathor, the Goddess of Love and Beauty. With Travelxploria’s expert representative, explore its stunning carvings and celestial ceiling before returning to the cruise by 1:00 PM. Set sail toward Luxor, enjoying a delightful Asian buffet lunch at 1:30 PM while cruising along the scenic Nile River. As the evening sets in, relish a street-food-style sandwich dinner at 7:30 PM, soaking in the tranquil atmosphere of Luxor. Spend the night aboard your luxurious cruise, as Travelxploria ensures a seamless and unforgettable journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"West Bank","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at 6:00 AM before setting out on an enchanting journey to Luxor’s West Bank at 7:00 AM. With Travelxploria’s expert representative, explore the awe-inspiring Valley of the Kings, where Egypt’s greatest pharaohs rest, and marvel at the Temple of Queen Hatshepsut, a stunning tribute to Egypt’s only female pharaoh. Return to the cruise by 12:30 PM and enjoy a light buffet lunch while relaxing on board. As the evening unfolds, savor an exquisite Indian buffet dinner at 7:30 PM, followed by a mesmerizing belly dancer show, ensuring a night of cultural delight. Retreat for a comfortable overnight stay in Luxor, as Travelxploria guarantees a seamless and memorable experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" East Bank | Esna","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast at 6:30 AM, followed by an enchanting visit to the East Bank at 7:30 AM, where you will explore the majestic Karnak and Luxor Temples with Travelxploria’s expert representative guiding you through their rich history. Return to the cruise for a lavish international buffet lunch at 1:00 PM, after which guests disembarking in Cairo or Luxor will proceed with their journeys. The cruise then sets sail towards Edfu via Esna Lock, offering breathtaking views along the Nile. End the evening with a sumptuous set menu dinner at 7:30 PM, and relax in the comfort of your cruise for an overnight stay in Edfu, all while Travelxploria ensures a seamless and unforgettable experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Edfu Temple | Kom Ombo Temple","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at 6:00 AM, followed by an immersive visit to the Edfu Temple at 7:00 AM, where Travelxploria’s expert representative will guide you through its fascinating history. At 9:30 AM, the cruise sails towards Kom Ombo, allowing you to enjoy the stunning Nile views. Indulge in an authentic Egyptian meal for lunch at 1:00 PM before exploring the magnificent Kom Ombo Temple at 3:30 PM, known for its unique double dedication to Sobek and Horus. As the day winds down, savor a BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay in Aswan, all with Travelxploria’s seamless assistance ensuring a remarkable journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Aswan sightseeing","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast at 7:00 AM, followed by a guided visit to the iconic High Dam and the enchanting Philae Temple at 8:00 AM, where Travelxploria’s expert representative ensures a seamless experience. Return to the cruise and enjoy a delightful seafood buffet for lunch at 1:00 PM before heading to the Nubian Museum at 2:00 PM, an immersive journey into the rich Nubian heritage. In the evening, savor a flambé dinner at 7:30 PM, then immerse yourself in the vibrant Nubian Party at 8:00 PM. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, enjoy a restful overnight stay in Aswan, making this a day to remember.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farwell","day_summary":"

Enjoy a final breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, followed by smooth disembarkation and check-out with the seamless assistance of Travelxploria’s dedicated representative. You will then be transferred comfortably to Aswan Airport for your final departure, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable end to your incredible journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Nile Cruise from Aswan","to":"Aswan Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Tokyo with a shared transfer to the hotel and free time to relax.
  • Explore Tokyo’s iconic landmarks on a guided city tour with lunch and dinner included.
  • Discover Kawaguchiko and ascend Mount Fuji, with a stay at a traditional Ryokan.
  • Visit a heritage village, scenic falls, Toyota Museum, and arrive in Kyoto.
  • Full-day tour of Kyoto's temples, shrines, bamboo forest, and vibrant Gion district.
  • Visit Nara’s giant Buddha, Horyuji Temple, and end the day exploring Osaka.
  • Tour Himeji Castle and Korakuen Garden with free time in Okayama.
  • Stroll through Kurashiki, visit Hiroshima’s memorials, and explore Miyajima Island.
  • Departure day with cherished memories of your Japanese journey.
4o

[{"city":"Tokyo","country":"Japan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050149740-AdobeStock_265237090.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050150127-AdobeStock_309758984.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050149562-AdobeStock_179685887.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050149869-AdobeStock_268173642.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050149996-AdobeStock_272195954.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050150256-AdobeStock_323459394.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050150386-AdobeStock_577929175.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050150515-AdobeStock_630753197.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/Tokyo/1747050150647-AdobeStock_1013154432.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Tokyo","day_summary":"

Welcome to Japan! Upon arrival and completion of customs formalities, a Travelxploria Representative will greet you and assist with your transfer to the hotel via a shared shuttle bus. Once you’ve checked in, the remainder of the day is yours to relax or explore the surroundings at your own pace. Later in the afternoon, our representative will provide you with all the necessary information and details regarding the exciting tour that awaits you in the coming days.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Haneda International Airport","to":"Tokyo","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1540,"h_name":"Shinagawa Prince Hotel","h_country":"Japan","h_city":"Tokyo","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Shinagawa Prince Hotel/1747227318588-Shinagawa Prince Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Shinagawa Prince Hotel/1747227318703-Shinagawa Prince Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Shinagawa Prince Hotel/1747227318705-Shinagawa Prince Hotel 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Tokyo Guided City Tour","day_summary":"

This morning, embark on an extensive guided tour of Tokyo, lasting approximately five hours, exploring the city’s vibrant energy and peaceful charm. Begin with a brief stop at Zojoji Temple, offering a stunning view of Tokyo Tower and featuring hundreds of Jizo statues, protectors of children. Continue to the iconic Shibuya Crossing, followed by a visit to the Meiji Shrine, dedicated to Emperor Meiji and Empress Shoken. Travel along the stylish Omotesando Avenue, admire the Imperial Palace gardens and Nijubashi Bridge, and pass through Akihabara, Tokyo’s hub for anime and electronics, and Kokugikan Sumo Arena. Conclude the tour at the historic Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant before returning to the hotel. In the evening, meet your guide at 6:30 p.m. and travel by metro to explore Shinjuku’s dynamic nightlife, followed by dinner at a local restaurant. Return to the hotel by metro, accompanied by your guide.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Tokyo\"]","inserted_id":"[831]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Tokyo/Tokyo Guided City Tour/1747226279218-Zojoji Temple.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Tokyo/Tokyo Guided City Tour/1747226279378-Tokyo Tower.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Tokyo/Tokyo Guided City Tour/1747226297495-Shibuya Crossing.jpg\"}]"}}]}]},{"city":"KAWAGUCHIKO","country":"Japan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818858-AdobeStock_1454049470.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818025-AdobeStock_292398839.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818513-AdobeStock_835452854.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Japan/KAWAGUCHIKO/1747051818686-AdobeStock_1054176212.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":" Tokyo - Mount Fuji - Kawaguchiko","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

Today, we’ll immerse ourselves in the rich cultural heritage of Kyoto, Japan’s imperial capital from 794 to 1868. Remarkably untouched during World War II, Kyoto has preserved its artistic treasures. Our journey begins in Arashiyama, where we’ll admire the scenic Togetsukyo Bridge and visit the revered Tenryuji Temple, followed by a peaceful walk through the enchanting bamboo forest. We’ll then explore Fushimi Inari Shrine, the Imperial Palace, and the stunning Golden Pavilion (Kinkakuji Temple). In the evening, we’ll transfer you to Gion, Kyoto’s traditional district. Enjoy free time here, with the return to the hotel on your own by taxi.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and travel to Nara, arriving by 9:00 a.m. to visit the iconic Todaiji Temple, built in 752 and home to a majestic giant Buddha statue. Surrounded by a peaceful park with friendly, free-roaming deer, it’s a perfect spot for photos and reflection. At 10:30 a.m., we’ll head to Horyuji Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site with ancient wooden structures and deep spiritual heritage. After exploring, we’ll enjoy lunch before continuing to Osaka at 2:30 p.m. In the evening, we’ll visit Dotonbori, where you can experience its vibrant nightlife, neon lights, and delicious cuisine.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Osaka, traveling through densely populated areas and coastal highways toward Osaka Bay. By 9:45 a.m., we’ll arrive at Himeji to explore the breathtaking Himeji Castle, an iconic example of traditional Japanese architecture. After our castle visit, we’ll enjoy lunch at a local restaurant. If the castle is too crowded, we recommend strolling through the nearby scenic gardens. At 1:00 p.m., we’ll head to Okayama, where we’ll explore the serene Korakuen Garden and view the historic Okayama Castle. After free time in the city, we’ll arrive at our hotel by 5:30 p.m. for accommodation.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Okayama and shortly arrive in Kurashiki at 8:30 a.m., where you can stroll through its beautifully preserved historic district. At 10:00 a.m., we’ll continue to Hiroshima, arriving around 12:30 p.m. to visit the Peace Memorial, Atomic Bomb Dome, and Peace Memorial Museum—sites commemorating the tragic events of 1945. After lunch, we’ll take a short ferry ride to the spiritual island of Miyajima to explore the iconic Itsukushima Shrine and its floating torii gate. At 7:00 p.m., we’ll return to Hiroshima by ferry, where a delicious dinner awaits before concluding the day.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Tokyo; transfer to hotel and leisure time to explore on your own.
  • Guided city tour covering iconic sights like Shibuya Crossing, Meiji Shrine, and Sensoji Temple, with dinner in Shinjuku.
  • Ride the bullet train to Hiroshima, visit the Peace Memorial Park, and ferry to Miyajima Island to explore Itsukushima Shrine.
  • Scenic ferry ride to Matsuyama with visits to Matsuyama Castle, Ishiteji Temple, and traditional Dogo Onsen.
  • Shrine visit, garden stroll, and walk above sea whirlpools before arriving in Kobe.
  • Visit the Earthquake Memorial Museum and stay overnight in a Buddhist monastery with Zen meditation.
  • Full-day Kyoto city tour including Golden Pavilion, Fushimi Inari Shrine, and the Geisha district of Gion.
  • Departure with unforgettable memories of Japan.

Welcome to Japan! Upon arrival and completion of customs formalities, you’ll be warmly greeted by our Travelxploria Representative and transferred to your hotel via a shared shuttle bus. The remainder of the day is free for you to relax or explore Tokyo at your own pace. In the afternoon, our representative will provide you with all the essential details about your upcoming tour, ensuring you’re well-prepared for the exciting journey ahead across this beautiful and culturally rich country.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Haneda International Airport","to":"Tokyo","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1542,"h_name":"GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA","h_country":"Japan","h_city":"Tokyo","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA/1747227527964-GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA/1747227528166-GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA/1747227528212-GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA 1.jfif\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA/1747227528214-GRAND NIKKO TOKYO DAIBA.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Tokyo Guided City Tour","day_summary":"

This morning, embark on an extensive guided tour of Tokyo, lasting approximately five hours, exploring the city’s vibrant energy and peaceful charm. Begin with a brief stop at Zojoji Temple, offering a stunning view of Tokyo Tower and featuring hundreds of Jizo statues, protectors of children. Continue to the iconic Shibuya Crossing, followed by a visit to the Meiji Shrine, dedicated to Emperor Meiji and Empress Shoken. Travel along the stylish Omotesando Avenue, admire the Imperial Palace gardens and Nijubashi Bridge, and pass through Akihabara, Tokyo’s hub for anime and electronics, and Kokugikan Sumo Arena. Conclude the tour at the historic Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant before returning to the hotel. In the evening, meet your guide at 6:30 p.m. and travel by metro to explore Shinjuku’s dynamic nightlife, followed by dinner at a local restaurant. Return to the hotel by metro, accompanied by your guide.

Today, we cover a total distance of 860 km, including 800 km by high-speed bullet train. At 07:30 a.m., depart from the hotel and transfer to Tokyo Station to board the bullet train for a scenic four-hour journey to Hiroshima. If the group has fewer than 15 people, you will travel without a guide, who will meet you at Hiroshima Station. Upon arrival around 12:30 p.m., visit Hiroshima’s poignant Peace Memorial Park, the Atomic Bomb Dome, and the powerful Peace Memorial Museum. After some free time for lunch, we’ll head to the outskirts of Hiroshima and take a 15-minute ferry ride to Miyajima Island—famed for its spiritual beauty and the iconic Itsukushima Shrine, which stands elegantly over the sea. Enjoy time to explore the shrine and stroll through the charming island center. At 6:00 p.m., we’ll return by ferry and continue to our hotel, where dinner will be served.

Today, we embark on a scenic journey by ferry, covering approximately 50 km as we travel to Shikoku Island. Departing from the hotel at 08:00 a.m., we’ll board the ferry at 09:20 a.m. for a relaxing two-and-a-half-hour cruise through a beautiful sea passage dotted with islands—perfect for enjoying from the deck, so bring warm clothing. Upon arriving in Matsuyama at 12:00 p.m., we’ll ascend by cable car or chairlift to visit Matsuyama Castle, a historic hilltop fortress offering panoramic views. We’ll then explore Ishiteji Temple, a sacred Buddhist pilgrimage site rich in history and architectural charm. A delicious lunch will be included. In the afternoon, we’ll visit the famous Dogo Onsen, one of Japan’s oldest traditional bathhouses. We encourage you to embrace the unique Onsen culture—bathing customs will be explained. Please note that some Onsen may restrict entry to guests with tattoos, and bathing is traditionally done without clothing.

Today, we travel 345 km through scenic mountainous landscapes and across stunning suspension bridges. We depart Matsuyama at 07:30 a.m. and arrive in Kotohira by 10:00 a.m. Here, we’ll visit a revered Shinto shrine dedicated to the God of sailors, located atop Mount Zozu. The shrine can be reached by climbing 785 steps, but for those who prefer to stay at the base, there’s a vibrant tourist area and a small sake museum to enjoy. At 12:00 p.m., we depart for Takamatsu and visit the exquisite Ritsurin Garden, one of Japan’s most beautiful traditional gardens. Lunch will be included at a local restaurant. At 03:00 p.m., we head to Naruto, where we’ll explore a spectacular bridge with a glass floor, offering views of the famous sea whirlpools from 45 meters above (tide permitting). We then continue through dramatic sea-crossing bridges and arrive in Kobe by 07:00 p.m. for an evening stroll in its vibrant downtown.

Today’s journey covers 140 km and begins after breakfast with a visit to the Earthquake Memorial Museum in Kobe, honoring the victims of the devastating 1995 earthquake and showcasing the city's inspiring recovery. At 10:30 a.m., we depart Kobe and head toward Osaka, Japan’s second-largest city, making a brief technical stop if required. By 11:30 a.m., we depart for Mount Koya, the spiritual heart of Shingon Buddhism in Japan. Along the way, we stop for lunch (included). Upon arrival, we explore the Okuno Mausoleum—a sacred cemetery nestled in the forest with over 200,000 tombstones—and visit the historic Kongobuji Temple, founded in 1593. We’ll spend the night in a traditional Buddhist monastery, where monks will guide us through a Zen meditation session (Ajikan), followed by a vegetarian dinner. Note: Rooms are traditional with shared bathrooms, and meditation may not be guaranteed during peak dates. Alternate accommodation in nearby hotels may be arranged if necessary.

Today’s journey covers approximately 130 km. We begin with a traditional Japanese breakfast at the temple before departing at 07:15 a.m. for Kyoto. Arriving by 10:30 a.m., we’ll spend the day exploring this culturally rich city, which served as Japan’s capital from 794 to 1868. Spared from bombing during World War II, Kyoto retains a vast wealth of historic architecture and cultural treasures. Our guided tour includes visits to the stunning Kinkakuji Temple, known as the Golden Pavilion, surrounded by beautifully landscaped gardens, and the Imperial Palace. After free time for lunch, we’ll visit the iconic Fushimi Inari Shrine, famous for its thousands of vibrant red torii gates. We then transfer to Gion, Kyoto’s historic Geisha district, where you’ll have time to explore at your own pace. Return to the hotel is unaccompanied—your guide will provide detailed instructions. Note: If you’ve previously toured Kyoto, the guide can recommend alternate experiences.​

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Sapporo, make your own way to the hotel, and relax for the evening.
  • Enjoy a full-day guided tour to the charming port city of Otaru with highlights including the Otaru Canal and Tanaka Sake Brewery.
  • Board a scenic train journey to Hakodate and spend your afternoon at leisure.
  • Explore Hakodate’s vibrant morning market, Red Brick Warehouses, Motomachi District, and historic Goryokaku Fort on a guided tour.
  • Travel via bullet train to Sendai and enjoy a relaxing afternoon at leisure.
  • Take a half-day tour to Matsushima to visit the ancient Zuiganji Temple and enjoy a cruise through the scenic bay.
  • Board the train to Tokyo and enjoy the rest of the day exploring Japan’s bustling capital at your own pace.
  • Your memorable northern Japan journey ends; transfer independently to the airport or continue exploring.

Welcome to Japan! Your exciting journey through this incredible country begins today. Upon arrival, please make your own way to the designated hotel. If you arrive before check-in (usually between 2–3 pm), feel free to leave your luggage at the reception and explore the nearby area. Take the evening to relax, unwind, and recover from your flight. Our Travelxploria representative will be available to assist you at the hotel and ensure you're ready for your first full day of touring tomorrow.

After breakfast, your local guide will meet you at your hotel around 8:00 AM for a full-day tour of Otaru, a charming port city located just 30 minutes northwest of Sapporo. Renowned for its beautifully preserved canal, traditional sake breweries, and deep-rooted fishing heritage, Otaru offers a glimpse into Hokkaido’s rich history and culture. During the tour, you’ll explore key highlights such as the Otaru Canal, Sakaimachi Street, and the Tanaka Sake Brewery, along with other notable landmarks throughout the town. Return to Sapporo by approximately 5:00 PM and enjoy the evening at your leisure, perfect for discovering the vibrant nightlife of Hokkaido’s capital.

At the scheduled time today, proceed to the station and board your train bound for Hakodate. Enjoy a scenic journey of approximately 4 hours as you travel through Japan’s picturesque countryside. Upon arrival, head to your centrally located hotel and check in. The remainder of the afternoon is yours to enjoy at leisure. For a memorable experience, consider taking the cable car up Mount Hakodate, which rises 330 meters above the city and offers breathtaking panoramic night views of Hakodate’s skyline.

This morning, your local guide will meet you at your hotel around 9:00 AM for a half-day walking tour of Hakodate. Begin at the lively Hakodate Morning Market, home to over 250 stalls selling fresh produce and local delicacies—don’t miss the chance to try a seafood donburi. Continue to the historic Red Brick Warehouses, now transformed into a charming hub of shops, restaurants, and entertainment. Next, stroll through the Motomachi District, where Russian, British, and Chinese architecture reflect Hakodate’s global influences since Japan’s opening in the 1850s. Conclude your tour around 1:00 PM with a visit to Goryokaku Fort.

After breakfast, meet your local guide in the hotel lobby around 9:30 AM for a half-day tour to Matsushima, one of Japan’s most scenic destinations. Begin with a visit to the historic Zuiganji Temple, founded in 828 AD during the Heian period by Jikaku Daishi. As a designated National Treasure, it stands as one of the most significant Buddhist temples in northern Japan. Next, enjoy a scenic cruise through Matsushima Bay, famous for its picturesque pine-covered islands. After soaking in the natural beauty and cultural heritage, return to Sendai around 3:00 PM and spend the rest of your day at leisure.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Explore the city’s iconic landmarks including the MCG and Eureka Skydeck.
  • Discover Phillip Island’s wildlife and experience the magical Penguin Parade on a small group eco tour.
  • Journey along the scenic Great Ocean Road and marvel at Victoria’s spectacular coastline.
  • Depart Melbourne and travel to the vibrant coastal paradise of the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into fun with the Best of Both Worlds pass at Movie World and Sea World.
  • Soar above the hinterland on a hot air balloon ride, paired with a complimentary Arro Jet experience.
  • Bid farewell to Gold Coast and transfer to your next destination—Hamilton Island.
  • Enjoy a full-day Cruise Whitsundays tour to explore the marine wonders of the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Relax and explore Hamilton Island at your own pace with a leisurely free day.
  • Depart from Hamilton Island and head to the stunning harbour city of Sydney.
  • Use your Merlin Four Attraction Pass to discover Sydney’s top attractions and join a guided Opera House tour.
  • Witness the beauty of the Blue Mountains at sunset on an unforgettable full-day tour.
  • Depart from Sydney, taking home the cherished memories of your incredible Australian journey.

[{"city":"Melbourne","country":"Australia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892745-AdobeStock_571879591.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892229-AdobeStock_122918061.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058891761-AdobeStock_14809750.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892054-AdobeStock_78014018.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892400-AdobeStock_123778075.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892573-AdobeStock_158368495.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Melbourne","day_summary":"

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free arrival in Melbourne with a comfortable transfer from the airport directly to your 4-star hotel located in the heart of the Central Business District, where a delicious breakfast is included as part of your stay.

Discover Melbourne's vibrant sporting culture with an immersive behind-the-scenes tour of the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG), delving into its storied past and world-class facilities. During the one-hour tour, explore highlights such as the renowned MCC Long Room, the historic MCC Library (established in 1873), the MCG Tapestry, player change rooms, and the cricketers’ viewing room. Gain exclusive access to the Ron Casey Media Centre, admire the portraits of cricket legends Sir Donald Bradman and Sachin Tendulkar, and enjoy a rare walk on the arena itself. The tour also includes a visit to the Cricket Victoria Bill Lawry Centre, the Ponsford Stand, and the City Terrace, offering stunning panoramic views of Melbourne’s skyline.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia's arts and cultural capital.
  • Discover stunning wildlife on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade tour.
  • Explore the iconic Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s scenic coastal wonders.
  • Depart Melbourne with a seamless shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in tropical Cairns and prepare for nature-filled adventures.
  • Journey through ancient rainforests via Skyrail & Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Cruise to Green Island for a full day on the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Depart from Cairns with a smooth shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in the Gold Coast and dive into sun, surf, and excitement.
  • Enjoy Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds Pass.​
  • Depart Gold Coast with a comfortable shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a Big Bus hop-on hop-off pass and Merlin Attractions.
  • Embark on a full-day Blue Mountains adventure through nature and history.
  • Depart from Sydney, bringing home unforgettable memories of Australia.​

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your East African adventure begins in Nairobi, where you’ll hand-feed giraffes at the Giraffe Center, nurture orphaned elephants at the Daphne Sheldrick Wildlife Trust, and step into literary history at the Karen Blixen Museum. Next, ascend into the misty highlands of Aberdare National Park for a safari at The Ark Lodge—watch nocturnal wildlife gather at the floodlit waterhole beneath the starry African sky. Then, journey to Ol Pejeta Conservancy’s sprawling sanctuary, spotting rhinos, elephants, and lions by day and visiting its remarkable chimpanzee refuge. From there, immerse yourself in the legendary Masai Mara’s rolling plains, tracking the Big Five on exhilarating game drives and savoring sunsets painted in gold. Cross the border into Tanzania’s Serengeti to witness the Great Migration sweeping across endless grasslands, before descending into the Ngorongoro Crater’s ancient caldera—home to black rhinos, flamingos, and encounters with Masai warriors. Pause at Lake Manyara for a serene interlude among forested shores where lions climb trees and colorful birds flit overhead. Finally, trade savanna for sea on Zanzibar, wandering the labyrinthine alleys of Stone Town—admiring carved wooden doors and bustling spice markets—then succumb to the heady fragrances of cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves on a guided spice plantation tour. Each day with Travelxploria weaves wildlife wonder, cultural immersion, and sensory delight into a journey you’ll treasure forever.

Upon landing at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, you’ll be warmly welcomed by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a smooth arrival experience. After a friendly meet and greet, followed by a brief yet insightful safari introduction, you’ll be comfortably transferred to your city hotel. Depending on your flight schedule, immerse yourself in Nairobi’s rich culture and wildlife—feed gentle giraffes at the Giraffe Center, visit rescued baby elephants at the Daphne Sheldrick Orphanage, explore the Karen Blixen Museum, or shop for beautiful handmade crafts at Kazuri Beads. Unwind from your journey and enjoy a relaxing overnight stay.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your hotel before setting off on a scenic drive north of Nairobi. Pass through the lush coffee and tea plantations of the central Kenya highlands, soaking in the picturesque landscapes. Arrive at Aberdare Country Club just in time for a delightful lunch. Later, transfer to The Ark Lodge, nestled within Aberdare National Park. Spend the afternoon on an exciting game drive or relax on the lodge’s balcony, watching wildlife gather at the floodlit waterhole. Expect to see elephants, buffaloes, waterbucks, bongos, and rhinos. Dinner and an overnight stay at your lodge.

Start your morning with a delightful breakfast at the lodge before embarking on a scenic drive to Ol Pejeta Conservancy. Upon arrival, enjoy a delicious lunch before setting off on an exciting afternoon game drive. Keep your eyes peeled for majestic lions, towering giraffes, mighty elephants, and the rare white rhino roaming the vast plains. Visit the renowned chimpanzee sanctuary, home to rescued primates, and if time allows, engage with the local communities living near the conservancy for a cultural experience. As the sun sets, unwind over dinner and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay at your booked accommodation.

Upon arrival, check in at your luxurious camp and enjoy a delightful lunch, soaking in the serene surroundings. In the afternoon, embark on your first thrilling game drive, exploring the vast conservancy teeming with lions, elephants, buffaloes, cheetahs, and a vibrant array of birdlife. As the sun sets over the golden savannah, capture unforgettable moments before returning to your lodge for a delicious dinner and a restful overnight stay.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at the camp, preparing for an exciting adventure ahead. Set off on a full-day game drive, exploring the vast conservancy teeming with majestic wildlife. Enjoy a picnic lunch amidst the breathtaking savannah, soaking in the raw beauty of nature. For a cultural touch, you may opt to visit a traditional Maasai village, where you can interact with the locals and learn about their rich heritage and customs. Continue your afternoon game drive, witnessing more of Africa’s untamed wilderness before returning to your lodge for a delightful dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Serengeti","country":"Tanzania","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Tanzania/Serengeti/1744731923335-AdobeStock_205899022.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Tanzania/Serengeti/1744731923908-AdobeStock_211044245.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Tanzania/Serengeti/1744731924015-AdobeStock_262438127.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer to Serengati","day_summary":"

Begin your day with an early breakfast before checking out of the lodge. Transfer to the airstrip for a scenic flight to the Kenya-Tanzania border via Migori. Upon arrival, a seamless road transfer takes you to Isebania, where you'll be assisted with immigration formalities before meeting your Tanzania representative. Continue to Tarime airstrip for a short flight to Kogatende airstrip, where your 4x4 Safari Landcruiser awaits. Arrive at the luxurious Ole Serai Tented Camp for a delicious lunch and a moment of relaxation. In the afternoon, embark on an exhilarating game drive across the legendary Serengeti, home to the Great Wildebeest Migration. Conclude your day with a delightful dinner and a restful overnight stay.

Spend a thrilling full day exploring the vast Serengeti National Park, with morning and afternoon game drives offering breathtaking encounters with Africa’s wildlife. As Tanzania’s most iconic national park, Serengeti is famed for the Great Migration, where over a million wildebeest and 200,000 zebras move across the plains in search of fresh grazing. Their instinct to migrate is so powerful that no drought, gorge, or predator-infested river can stop them. Traverse diverse landscapes, from open savannahs to acacia woodlands, and witness nature at its most raw and untamed. Enjoy a delicious dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

Start your day with an early breakfast before checking out and embarking on a scenic journey from Serengeti to Ngorongoro Crater, with exciting game viewing along the way. Arrive at the breathtaking Ngorongoro Crater, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, and descend into its lush volcanic caldera for an immersive six-hour safari experience. Enjoy a picnic lunch in the heart of the crater, surrounded by an abundance of wildlife, including lions, rhinos, elephants, and flamingos. Later, ascend and head to your safari lodge, with a brief cultural stop at a Maasai village to learn about their rich traditions. Dinner and overnight stay at hotel.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your lodge, then collect your packed lunch before departing for Arusha. Enjoy a visit to a local Art Gallery, where you can browse African curios and souvenirs, perfect for capturing the essence of your journey. Afterward, savor your packed lunch before heading to Lake Manyara Airstrip for your scheduled flight to Zanzibar (ETD: 11:25 AM – ETA: 2:20 PM). Upon arrival, a warm welcome awaits as representatives greet you and transfer you to your luxurious beachside hotel. Dinner and overnight stay at your booked hotel, soaking in the tranquil island ambiance.

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before setting off on a guided tour of Stone Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site brimming with history and culture. Walk in the footsteps of Arab Sultans, explore ancient labyrinths, and admire the iconic Zanzibar doors, each telling a story of its unique architectural heritage. After a sumptuous beachfront lunch, continue your journey with a scenic countryside tour to the fragrant spice plantations, where the air is rich with the scents of nutmeg, cinnamon, and cloves. Dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Leisure Day at Zanzibar","day_summary":"

Enjoy a leisurely full day at your luxurious beach resort, surrounded by the tranquil beauty of the coastline. Let the gentle ocean breeze and soothing waves create the perfect atmosphere for relaxation. Embrace the serene ambiance, taking in the breathtaking views of the endless horizon. With the warm sun above and soft sands beneath, this is a day to simply unwind and immerse yourself in pure tranquility. As evening falls, delight in a picturesque sunset, followed by a delightful dinner & overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey in Zanzibar comes to a close, take in the last moments of paradise. Spend the morning soaking up the sunshine, whether by the shimmering pool or on the soft, golden sands of the beach, letting the gentle waves lull you into relaxation. Enjoy the tranquil atmosphere as you reflect on the incredible experiences of your trip. In the afternoon, our Travelxploria representative will meet you for a smooth and comfortable transfer to the airport, ensuring your journey home.

packages.package_name: Wild Encounters: From Samburu to the Mara
packages.overview:
• Samburu National Reserve – Scenic drive through lush tea plantations to the rugged, semi-arid wilderness teeming with rare wildlife species.
  • Samburu Safari – Thrilling morning and afternoon game drives to spot the iconic reticulated giraffe, Grevy’s zebra, and Somali ostrich.
  • Ol Pejeta Conservancy – Immersive safari experience featuring white rhinos, lions, and a visit to the inspiring chimpanzee sanctuary.
  • Lake Nakuru National Park – Picturesque landscapes, vibrant flamingos, and incredible wildlife encounters, including endangered rhinos.
  • Masai Mara Safari – Iconic African adventure with golden savannahs, breathtaking wildlife sightings, and exhilarating game drives.
  • Masai Mara Game Drives – Dawn and dusk safaris to witness the circle of life in one of the world’s most spectacular ecosystems.

After breakfast, set off on a scenic drive north of Nairobi, passing through the lush, green landscapes of central Kenya, where vast tea and coffee plantations stretch across rolling hills. As you journey into the semi-arid wilderness of Samburu National Reserve, the scenery gradually transforms into rugged terrain dotted with acacia trees. Arriving in time for lunch, take a moment to relax before heading out for an afternoon game drive. Keep an eye out for the unique wildlife of the region, including the reticulated giraffe, gerenuk, Grevy’s zebra, Beisa oryx, and Somali ostrich. Return in the evening for dinner and an overnight stay.

Spend the entire day exploring the stunning semi-arid landscapes of Samburu National Reserve with morning and afternoon game drives. Traverse the vast plains and riverine forests in search of iconic wildlife, including elephants, big cats, and the unique species found only in this region. A visit to Buffalo Springs offers an opportunity to learn about the origins of its name and witness its natural beauty. In between game drives, relax and take in the breathtaking surroundings. Enjoy delicious meals and unwind at your lodge, soaking in the tranquility of the African wilderness.

Arrive in time for a delicious lunch at your camp, followed by an exciting afternoon game drive. As the day winds down, return to your camp for a delightful dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

Start your day with a warm cup of tea or coffee at the reception area before setting off on an exhilarating early morning game drive. The cool morning air creates the perfect conditions for wildlife sightings, as predators are still active and grazers roam the plains in search of food. Witness the golden sunrise over the savannah as you track the Big Five and other remarkable creatures. Return to your lodge or camp for a hearty breakfast and some leisure time. After lunch, venture out again for an afternoon game drive, soaking in the beauty of the wilderness until sunset. Conclude the day with a delightful dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, depart from the lodge and embark on a scenic drive through the beautiful landscapes of Kenya. Arriving in Nairobi by afternoon, you will be transferred to the airport, where our representative will assist with the final arrangements for your departure.

packages.package_name: Thrilling Safari Tour of Masai Mara
packages.overview:
Kiambethu Tea Farm – Stroll through lush tea plantations, sip freshly brewed tea, and immerse yourself in rich colonial history.
Masai Market – Wander through a colorful marketplace, discovering exquisite handcrafted souvenirs and traditional Kenyan artistry.
Aberdares Wilderness – Escape to a serene mountain paradise, where dense forests and hidden waterfalls shelter elusive wildlife.
Lake Nakuru Safari – Witness a mesmerizing pink-hued lake, home to vibrant flamingos and majestic rhinos roaming freely.
Masai Mara Game Drives – Experience thrilling encounters with the Big Five in the world-famous African savannah.
Sunrise Safari – Capture golden dawn hues while spotting prowling lions and graceful giraffes at their most active hour.
Balloon Safari – Soar above the Masai Mara at sunrise, taking in breathtaking panoramic views of the vast, untamed landscape.
Cultural Masai Village Visit – Engage with the legendary Masai warriors and learn about their unique customs and traditions.

As you arrive at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, who will ensure a seamless start to your Kenyan adventure. With a friendly smile and expert guidance, they will assist you with your luggage and escort you to your private transfer. As you drive through the vibrant streets of Nairobi, your representative will share insights about the city, setting the tone for an unforgettable journey. Upon arrival at your carefully selected hotel, you’ll check in and unwind, preparing for the incredible experiences ahead. Enjoy a restful night.

After breakfast, set off on a scenic drive to Limuru for a visit to the lush Kiambethu Tea Farm, where you’ll learn about the tea-making process and enjoy the serene surroundings. After a delightful lunch, immerse yourself in local culture with a visit to a Masai market in Nairobi, where vibrant crafts, jewelry, and souvenirs showcase Kenya’s rich heritage. Stroll through the bustling stalls, interact with local artisans, and perhaps take home a unique keepsake. As the day winds down, return to your hotel for a relaxing evening and overnight stay.

The evening offers a chance to witness the beauty of nature in a serene setting with overnight stay in Aberdares.

packages.overview:
• Amboseli National Park – Witness majestic elephants roaming freely beneath the breathtaking backdrop of snow-capped Mount Kilimanjaro.
  • Lake Naivasha – Relax by the serene waters, surrounded by picturesque landscapes and an abundance of birdlife.
  • Masai Mara Game Reserve – Experience thrilling safari drives, spotting stealthy predators and the iconic Big Five in their untamed habitat.
  • Scenic Rift Valley – Marvel at dramatic escarpments and rolling savannahs on your journey through Kenya’s diverse terrain.
  • Unforgettable Wildlife Moments – Capture awe-inspiring encounters, from graceful gazelles to powerful lions in action.

The park is renowned for its majestic elephant herds, diverse wildlife, and over 420 bird species drawn to its lush, spring-fed plains. Upon arrival at your lodge, enjoy a delicious lunch and unwind amidst nature. The rest of the afternoon is at leisure before a delightful dinner and overnight stay in Amboseli.

packages.overview:
Nairobi – Arrive in Kenya’s vibrant capital, where adventure begins with warm hospitality and an exciting safari briefing.


Samburu National Reserve – Discover rare wildlife, from reticulated giraffes to majestic elephants, along the tranquil Uaso Nyiro River.


Ol Pejeta Conservancy – Visit Kenya’s largest black rhino sanctuary and interact with rescued chimpanzees in a breathtaking landscape.


Lake Naivasha – Relax by the shimmering lake, surrounded by lush acacia trees and an abundance of birdlife.


Masai Mara –Witness the Big Five and exhilarating predator hunts in Africa’s most renowned wildlife reserve.


Rift Valley Viewpoint – Soak in sweeping landscapes before bidding farewell to an unforgettable adventure.

As you arrive at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport in Nairobi, the warm hospitality of Travelxploria awaits you. Our friendly representative will greet you with a smile, ensuring a smooth transition through immigration formalities. With a seamless transfer to your city hotel, you'll get a chance to unwind after your journey. As you settle in, our representative will provide a detailed briefing about your upcoming adventure, answering any questions and ensuring you're well-prepared for the incredible safari ahead. Take the evening to relax, soak in the Nairobi city vibes, and anticipate the unforgettable experiences that await. Overnight stay in Nairobi.

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Samburu Game Reserve, arriving in time for lunch at your lodge or camp. This breathtaking reserve is home to the tranquil Uaso Nyiro River, which attracts a variety of rare wildlife, including crocodiles, the long-necked gerenuk, Grevy’s zebra, and the striking reticulated giraffe—species not commonly found in the southern regions. Elephants gather by the river, shaded by acacia, doum palms, and tamarind trees, while Buffalo Springs provides a thriving habitat for cheetahs, leopards, and other African mammals. In the afternoon, set out on an exhilarating game drive, returning to the lodge by sunset. Dinner and overnight in Samburu.

Spend the day exploring the untamed beauty of Samburu Game Reserve with thrilling morning and afternoon game drives. Traverse the rugged landscapes in search of rare and endemic wildlife, including the elusive leopard, majestic elephants, and the unique Samburu Special Five—Grevy’s zebra, Somali ostrich, reticulated giraffe, Beisa oryx, and the long-necked gerenuk. The reserve’s diverse ecosystem, framed by acacia woodlands and the winding Uaso Nyiro River, offers breathtaking sightings and unforgettable moments. In between game drives, relax at your lodge and soak in the serene surroundings. All meals and overnight in Samburu.

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to the breathtaking Ol Pejeta Conservancy, arriving just in time for a delightful lunch at your tented camp. Nestled around a tranquil waterhole, this exclusive sanctuary blends the raw beauty of the wild with the charm of safari luxury.

In the afternoon, set out on an unforgettable game drive, where you'll visit the renowned sanctuaries for rescued chimpanzees and endangered black rhinos. With the snow-capped peaks of Mount Kenya as your backdrop, witness the Big Five and a rich variety of wildlife thriving in this conservation haven. Dinner and overnight at Ol Pejeta.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at the lodge before embarking on a scenic drive to the legendary Masai Mara Game Reserve. Arrive at your lodge in time for a delightful lunch and settle into your comfortable camp, surrounded by the untamed beauty of the African savannah.

In the afternoon, set out on an exhilarating game drive, where you may encounter majestic lions, swift cheetahs, and other incredible predators roaming freely in their natural habitat. As the golden sun dips below the horizon, return to your lodge for a delectable dinner, recounting the day's thrilling encounters. Overnight at Masai Mara.
